accounts.name: finalizer
docs: Anyone can finalize after voting ends

accounts.name: resolver
docs: Resolver (protocol authority for now, DAO in future)

errors.name: MaxAffiliatesReached
errors.msg: Maximum affiliates reached for this campaign

errors.name: AffiliateNotRegistered
errors.msg: Affiliate not registered for this campaign

errors.name: AffiliateAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Affiliate already registered for this campaign

errors.name: AffiliateTierTooLow
errors.msg: Affiliate tier too low for this campaign

fields.name: disputes_lost
docs: Number of successful challenges against this affiliate

types.name: AffiliateRegistration
docs: Affiliate registration for a specific campaign

fields.name: action_value
docs: Action value (e.g., purchase amount in USDC smallest unit)

fields.name: fraud_count
docs: Fraud count (attributions challenged and confirmed as fraud)

fields.name: escrow
docs: Escrow token account holding campaign funds

fields.name: custom_hold_period
docs: Custom hold period in seconds (0 = use tier default)

types.name: CustomerAttribution
docs: Tracks customer attributions to prevent duplicates

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that can update governance parameters (initially deployer, then DAO)

fields.name: proposal_threshold
docs: Minimum tokens required to create a proposal

fields.name: proposal_data
docs: Proposal data (encoded instruction or parameter change)

fields.name: total_volume
docs: Total volume processed (in USDC smallest unit)

types.name: ProtocolParameters
docs: Protocol parameters that can be changed via governance

fields.name: bronze_min_stake
docs: Minimum stake for Bronze bridge tier

fields.name: silver_min_stake
docs: Minimum stake for Silver bridge tier

fields.name: gold_min_stake
docs: Minimum stake for Gold bridge tier

fields.name: platinum_min_stake
docs: Minimum stake for Platinum bridge tier

fields.name: min_challenge_bond
docs: Minimum challenge bond floor (in USDC smallest units)

fields.name: max_lock_time
docs: Maximum lock time for voting escrow (seconds)

fields.name: lock_end
docs: Lock end time (voting power decays toward unlock)

fields.name: last_update
docs: Last time voting power was calculated
